changes: Fast Blade: TP cost reduced from 70 to 60.
Savage Blade: Enmity generation increased.
Goring Blade: Combo potency increased from 220 to 240; Damage over time potency increased from 40 to 50.
Royal Authority: Combo potency increased from 340 to 350.
Clemency: Casting time reduced from 3 to 2 seconds.
Divine Veil: Barrier now activates when healing yourself; Recast time reduced from 150 seconds to 120 seconds.
Sword Oath: Use no longer interrupts weaponskill combos.
Shield Oath: Use no longer interrupts weaponskill combos; Damage penalty reduced from 20% to 15%; Enmity generation increased.
Defiance: Enmity generation increased.
Hard Slash: TP cost reduced from 70 to 60.
Souleater: TP cost reduced from 60 to 50.
Delirium: TP cost reduced from 60 to 50.
Grit: Use no longer interrupts weaponskill combos; Enmity generation increased.
Demolish: Damage over time potency increased from 40 to 50.
Howling Fist: Potency increased from 170 to 210.
Spinning Edge: TP cost reduced from 60 to 50.
Heavy Shot: TP cost reduced from 60 to 50.
Straight Shot: TP cost reduced from 60 to 50.

The Warden's Paean: Categorized as an ability; Casting time reduced from 2.5 seconds to 0; Recast time increased from 2.5 seconds to 45 seconds; Now removes one detrimental effect from a party member or pet.
Split Shot: TP cost reduced from 70 to 60.
Slug Shot: Timing of icon flash adjusted for Enhanced Slug Shot.
Clean Shot: Timing of icon flash adjusted for Cleaner Shot.
Lead Shot: TP cost reduced from 80 to 70.
Hot Shot: TP cost reduced from 80 to 70.
Gauss Round: Potency increased from 180 to 200.
Hypercharge: Duration increased from 15 to 20 seconds.
Rook Autoturret: Physical damage buff increased from 5% to 10%.
Bishop Autoturret: Magic damage buff increased from 5% to 10%.
Astral Fire/Umbral Ice: Duration increased from 10 to 12 seconds; Activation timing adjusted.
Ruin III: Potency increased from 120 to 200.
Diurnal Sect: Now reduces enmity generation.
Nocturnal Sect: Now reduces enmity generation.
Luminiferous Aether: Duration increased from 15 to 24 seconds.
Shuffle: Renamed to Redraw; No longer possible to draw the same card twice consecutively.
The Ewer: Potency increased.
The Spire: Potency increased.
Calculations for physical damage dealt by tanks have been adjusted.
Sprint: TP cost removed in PvP areas.
Sprint: Duration set to 10 seconds in PvP areas.
Sprint: Use will no longer interrupt weaponskill combos.
Fast Blade: TP cost reduced from 70 to 60.
Savage Blade: Enmity generation increased.
Goring Blade: Potency when used as a combo action increased from 220 to 240.
Goring Blade: Damage over time potency increased from 40 to 50.
Royal Authority: Potency when used as a combo action increased from 340 to 350.
Clemency: Casting time reduced from 3 to 2 seconds.
Divine Veil: Protective barrier now activates when healing yourself.
Divine Veil: Recast time reduced from 150 seconds to 120 seconds.
Sword Oath: Use will no longer interrupt weaponskill combos.
Shield Oath: Use will no longer interrupt weaponskill combos.
Shield Oath: Damage penalty reduced from 20% to 15%.
Shield Oath: Enmity generation increased.

Souleater: TP cost reduced from 60 to 50.
Delirium: TP cost reduced from 60 to 50.
Grit: Use will no longer interrupt weaponskill combos.
Grit: Enmity generation increased.
Darkside: MP cost reduced by 1/3 in PvP areas.
Demolish: Damage over time potency increased from 40 to 50.
Howling Fist: Potency increased from 170 to 210.
Spinning Edge: TP cost reduced from 60 to 50.
Heavy Shot: TP cost reduced from 60 to 50.
Straight Shot: TP cost reduced from 60 to 50.
The Warden's Paean: Categorized as an ability.
The Warden's Paean: Casting time reduced from 2.5 seconds to 0 seconds.
The Warden's Paean: Recast time increased from 2.5 seconds to 45 seconds.
The Warden's Paean: Now removes a single detrimental effect from a party member or pet.
Split Shot: TP cost reduced from 70 to 60.
Slug Shot: Timing for Enhanced Slug Shot icon flash adjusted.
Clean Shot: Timing for Cleaner Shot icon flash adjusted.
Lead Shot: TP cost reduced from 80 to 70.
Hot Shot: TP cost reduced from 80 to 70.
Gauss Round: Potency increased from 180 to 200.
Hypercharge: Duration increased from 15 seconds to 20 seconds.
Rook Autoturret: Physical damage effect increased from 5% to 10%.
Bishop Autoturret: Magic damage effect increased from 5% to 10%.
Astral Fire/Umbral Ice: Duration increased from 10 seconds to 12 seconds.
Astral Fire/Umbral Ice: Activation timing adjusted.
Ruin III: Potency increased from 120 to 200.
Diurnal Sect: Now reduces enmity generation.
Nocturnal Sect: Now reduces enmity generation.
Aspected Benefic: Nocturnal Field effect halved in PvP areas.

Attunement: Activation timing adjusted.

new_content.name: Orchestrion

housing.name: Dandelion Garden Patch
housing.description: A tiny field of cheery dandelions that begs to be frolicked in.

housing.name: Level 5 Aetherial Wheel Stand
housing.description: A metal stand upon which aetherial wheels are placed and spun to charge. Holds two grade 1, two grade 2, and one grade 3 wheel.

housing.name: Crystal Bell
housing.description: One ring summons the crafter of coiffures to save you from your passé existence.

housing.name: Orchestrion
housing.description: A furnishing that is sure delight guests and residents alike, as they while away the hours listening to some of their favorite tunes.

housing.name: Pudding Floor Lamp
housing.description: A slimy floor lamp designed in the likeness of a pudding.

housing.name: Pudding Settee
housing.description: A slimy settee designed in the likeness of a pudding.

housing.name: Pudding Desk
housing.description: A slimy desk designed in the likeness of a pudding.

housing.name: Stuffed Onion Prince
housing.description: Attempting to peel away the layers of what makes this plush prince so glum will leave you with less than you started out with. As well as a mess of fabric.

housing.name: Alpine Supper Set
housing.description: This warm array of comfort food has become a treat for special occasions amongst the commoner families of Ishgard.

housing.name: High House Supper Set
housing.description: An extravagant course meal enjoyed by the nobility of Ishgard on saint feast days and other ceremonious occasions.

housing.name: Stuffed Eggplant Knight
housing.description: Designed with the most complicated pattern of the plush Mandragoras, this Knight will protect your castle by day, and woo the queen by night.

housing.name: Stuffed Garlic Star
housing.description: This stuffed jester may fill your heart with childish glee, but too much cuddling and you will reek to high heavens.

housing.name: Stuffed Tomato King
housing.description: Having no kingdom to call his own, this stuffed plush will be more than willing to rule your realm with his adorable little green fist.

housing.name: Stuffed Mandragora Queen
housing.description: This adorable plush doll comes complete with a fabric flower and tiny hooks on the hands that can be attached her to her secret lover.

housing.name: Pudding Throw Rug
housing.description: A slimy throw rug designed in the likeness of a pudding.

housing.name: Unit of Alpine Flooring
housing.description: Floorboards designed to complement alpine residences.

housing.name: Alpine Chandelier
housing.description: A sumptuous chandelier designed to complement alpine residences.

housing.name: Alpine Inner Wall
housing.description: An interior wall designed in the alpine fashion.

housing.name: Ultimate Kettle
housing.description: Unlike other kettles of legend, it cannot turn water to ale, nor is it bottomless. But it can boil water for tea in a count of sixty.

housing.name: Ultimate Kettle Zenith
housing.description: It can boil water for a quality blend of tea in a count of thirty. And it glows with a strange light.

housing.name: Ultimate Kettle Nexus
housing.description: A true kettle of legend that shines with such brilliance that it is said even gods would beg for a sip of its contents. It can boil water for a premium blend of tea in a count of five.

housing.name: Sephirot Root
housing.description: A masterful objet d'art rendering of the gnarled roots of a sacred tree.

housing.name: Sephirot Tree
housing.description: An imposing objet d'art of a sacred tree.

housing.name: Dinosaur Skull
housing.description: The crown of an ancient beast.

housing.name: Dinosaur Skeleton
housing.description: The torso and legs of an ancient beast.

housing.name: Dinosaur Tailbone
housing.description: The tail of an ancient beast.

housing.name: Topiary Sabotender
housing.description: A specially bred shrub pruned to the shape of a scampering sabotender.

housing.name: Living Arch
housing.description: An aging stone bridge covered in ivy and moss. Perfect for the romantic rendezvous.

housing.name: Shishi-Odoshi
housing.description: A fountain from the Far East originally used to scare away creatures and neighbors come to nibble on garden patches.

housing.name: Faust Striking Dummy
housing.description: A striking dummy created by the Illuminati to train their ranks for combat.

housing.name: Gnathic Lamp Tree
housing.description: Any Gnath would click contently beneath the gentle glow of this lamp tree.
